ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting data entry */,
  "dem_vote" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "rep_vote" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Republican party */,
  "year" REAL /* Year of the election */,
  "oct_rate" REAL /* October voter registration rate */,
  "nov_rate" INTEGER /* November voter registration rate */,
  "population_est" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the year */,
  "total_area_sqmi" REAL /* Total area in square miles */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area in square miles */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area in square miles */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who voted in the election */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the distribution of voters by age groups */,
  "ethnic_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the distribution of voters by ethnic groups */,
  "political_activity" TEXT /* JSON string representing political activities leading up to the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic entry */,
  "per_pov" REAL /* Percentage of population below poverty line */,
  "med_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "total_vote" REAL /* Total votes cast in the election */,
  "total_vote_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of total votes to eligible voters */,
  "age_groups" TEXT /* JSON string representing the distribution of the population by age groups */,
  "ethnic_groups" TEXT /* JSON string representing the distribution of the population by ethnic groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the distribution of the population by gender */,
  "voter_registration_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population registered to vote */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES election_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting ratio record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the voting data */,
  "dem_vote_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of Democratic votes */,
  "rep_vote_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of Republican votes */,
  "other_party_ratios" TEXT /* JSON string representing the voting ratios for other parties */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_ratios_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES election_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education level record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of educational data */,
  "less_high" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with less than high school education */,
  "high_diploma" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with a high school diploma */,
  "some_college" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with some college education */,
  "bachelors_or_higher" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "graduate_degree" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with a graduate degree or higher */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES demographics ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_percentages" (
  "percent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education percentage record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of educational data */,
  "per_less_high" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with less than high school education */,
  "per_high_diploma" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with a high school diploma */,
  "per_some_college" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with some college education */,
  "per_bachelors_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "graduate_degree_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with a graduate degree or higher */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_percentages_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES education_levels ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic change record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of demographic changes */,
  "less_high_change" REAL /* Change in less than high school education population */,
  "high_diploma_change" REAL /* Change in high school diploma population */,
  "some_college_change" REAL /* Change in some college population */,
  "bachelors_change" REAL /* Change in bachelor's degree or higher population */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "age_groups_change" TEXT /* JSON string representing the change in population by age groups */,
  "ethnic_groups_change" TEXT /* JSON string representing the change in population by ethnic groups */,
  "gender_distribution_change" TEXT /* JSON string representing the change in population by gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_changes_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES education_levels ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for population density record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of population density data */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density value */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "urban_density" REAL /* Population density in urban areas */,
  "rural_density" REAL /* Population density in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_density_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES demographics ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES election_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the region */,
  "dem_votes" INTEGER /* Total Democratic votes in the region */,
  "rep_votes" INTEGER /* Total Republican votes in the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State to which the region belongs */,
  "county" TEXT /* County to which the region belongs */,
  "city" TEXT /* City to which the region belongs */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code of the region */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Description of the analysis conducted */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion derived from the analysis */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* JSON string representing the data sources used for the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)
